context.profile.md:
Name: Alex Rivera
Email: alex@example.com
Phone: 555-0300
Work Experience:
- Senior Software Engineer at FinCo (2021–present): Built real-time data pipelines processing 5M events/day using Kafka and Python
- Software Engineer at StartupX (2018–2021): Shipped core product features used by 100K users, reduced API latency 40%
Skills: Python, Kafka, PostgreSQL, distributed systems, REST APIs
context.narrative.md: Positioning: Backend engineer who builds reliable, high-throughput systems. Targeting senior IC roles at data-driven companies.
context.research.md: Acme Corp: Series C, 300 employees. Product: AcmeData, an analytics platform for mid-market companies. Engineering blog active, recently published post on Kafka migration. Culture: data-driven decisions, remote-first, high ownership.
context.jd.md: Role: Senior Software Engineer. Requirements: Python (5+ years), distributed systems experience, Kafka or messaging queues, API design, ability to work cross-functionally. Nice to have: Go, Kubernetes.
context.team.md: Hiring manager: Sarah Chen, VP of Engineering. Interviewer: Tom Baker, Senior Engineer.
context.tracking.md:
# Acme Corp — Senior Engineer
Status: Interviewing
Applied: 2026-06-20

tests.expected_output: A full prep guide appended to tracking.md under '## Interview Prep — Hiring Manager — [Date]'. Includes: company cheat sheet with 3 key facts about Acme Corp, role alignment with top 3 JD requirements and proof points from profile.md, 8 behavioral questions with STAR outlines from Alex's experience, 5 technical questions about Python/distributed systems/Kafka, 3 company/culture fit questions, 5 questions to ask a hiring manager (focused on success metrics, team dynamics, challenges), and research gaps section.
assertions: Section header '## Interview Prep — Hiring Manager' appended to tracking.md
Company cheat sheet includes Acme Corp in one sentence and 3 key facts
Role alignment lists top 3 JD requirements (Python, distributed systems, Kafka/messaging)
At least one proof point references the 5M events/day pipeline from FinCo
Exactly 8 behavioral questions generated
Each behavioral question includes a STAR outline (Situation, Task, Action, Result)
Exactly 5 technical/role-specific questions generated
Exactly 3 company/cultural fit questions generated
Questions to ask are tailored to hiring manager round (success metrics, team dynamics, challenges)
Exactly 5 questions for the user to ask are provided
Research gaps section present
Prep guide appended to tracking.md (not overwriting existing content)
User told to use interview-coach agent for mock practice
